utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Relax every muscle in your body .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Listen to the plinky ... plunky music .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , now close you eyes , and think of a happy place .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , tell me your happy place .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: All right . No , no , no , not a Richard thing , just put down the glass . And get out !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I am sorry , but that is my happy place .

emotion_cause.span: 6_No , no , no , not a Richard thing , just put down the glass . And get out !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , okay , fine , use my happy place .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , I am just gonna , I have to ask that you do not move anything .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: All right , I will try not to .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , all right , so , your in a meadow , millions of stars in the sky ...

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Do you think breaking up with him was a huge mistake ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: All right , there are no questions in the happy place . Okay , just , the warm breeze , and the moonlight flowing through the trees ...

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I will bet he is totally over me , I will bet he is fine .

emotion_cause.span: 14_I will bet he is totally over me , I will bet he is fine .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: All right , betting and wagering of any kind , are , I am sure , not permitted in the happy place .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay ? There is just , you know , the ... the lovely waterfalls , and the , the trickling fountains ... and the ... the calming sounds of the babbling brook ...

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , this is not working . I am still awake and now I have to pee .
